Blazing Frost Watcher Plate Mail

When taking damage, the unit has a 15% chance to have their fortitude, physical and magic armor increased by 30% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 4 effects.

Once every 3 times the ability is activated, causes an explosion. When it happens, the armor wearer deals physical damage equal to 70% of own physical armor to all enemy units in a large radius around, and stuns all affected enemy units for 3 sec. The explosion may happen at most once every 5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
